question: How many papers are published in the IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference and report data collection?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?count) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 . ?contribution orkgp:P135046 ?venue . ?venue rdfs:label ?venue_label . FILTER(LCASE(STR(?venue_label)) = LCASE("IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference")) ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc . }

question: How many papers use interview as the data collection method?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?count) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 . ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc . ?dc orkgp:P1005 ?method . ?method orkgp:P94003 ?method_type . ?method_type rdfs:label ?method_type_label . FILTER(LCASE(STR(?method_type_label)) = LCASE("interview")) }

question: Which publication years are represented by papers that report survey as the data collection method?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 . ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year . ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc . ?dc orkgp:P1005 ?method . ?method orkgp:P94003 ?method_type . ?method_type rdfs:label ?method_type_label . FILTER(LCASE(STR(?method_type_label)) = LCASE("survey")) } ORDER BY ?year
